verses.first: Om Jai Jagdish Hare, Swami Jai Jagdish Hare
verses.second: Bhakt Janon Ke Sankat, Das Janon Ke Sankat, Kshan Mein Door Kare || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||

verses.first: Jo Dhyave Phal Pave, Dukh Binse Man Ka
verses.second: Sukh Sampatti Ghar Aave, Sukh Sampatti Ghar Aave, Kasht Mite Tan Ka || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||

verses.first: Mat Pita Tum Mere, Sharan Gahun Main Kiski
verses.second: Tum Bin Aur Na Dooja, Tum Bin Aur Na Dooja, Aas Karun Main Jiski || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||
Parabrahm Parmeshwar, Parabrahm Parmeshwar, Tum Sabke Swami || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||

verses.first: Tum Karuna Ke Sagar, Tum Palankarta
verses.second: Main Moorakh Phalkami, Main Sevak Tum Swami, Kripa Karo Bharta || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||

verses.first: Tum Ho Ek Agochar, Sabke Pranpati
verses.second: Kis Vidhi Milun Dayamay, Kis Vidhi Milun Dayamay, Tumko Main Kumati || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||
Apne Hath Uthao, Apne Sharan Lagao, Dwar Pada Tere || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||

verses.first: Vishay Vikar Mitao, Paap Haro Deva
verses.second: Shraddha Bhakti Badhao, Shraddha Bhakti Badhao, Santan Ki Seva || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||

verses.first: Om Jai Jagdish Hare, Swami Jai Jagdish Hare
verses.second: Bhakt Janon Ke Sankat, Das Janon Ke Sankat, Kshan Mein Door Kare || Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||
